title: poa molinerii var. multiflora
intro: Poa molinerii var. multiflora, also known as multiflorous Poa molinerii, is a plant species belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Poa molinerii var. multiflora are attributed to its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to soothe digestive problems and reduce fever. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
